_schema.title: string
_schema.age_notes: string or null — e.g. 'all ages' or 'late set may run past 10pm'
_schema.genres: array of strings (see genre vocabulary below)
_schema.field_trip: boolean — eligible for chaperoned student outing
_schema.christopher_performing: boolean — rare; for cases where Christopher is on the bill

events.title: Lionel Hampton Jazz Festival
events.age_notes: all ages — multi-day; student-facing educational programming
events.notes: One of the most storied student-oriented jazz festivals in the country. Multi-day drive-trip — good candidate for a field-trip cohort.

events.title: Tomahawk + Melvins — A Huge Waste of Your Time and Money Tour
events.age_notes: verify Showbox age policy — typically all ages, late set
events.notes: Two-night Seattle stand. Heavy/experimental rock — Mike Patton + Buzz Osborne territory.

events.title: Tank and the Bangas — The Last Balloon Tour
events.notes: With Ariel J. Genre-spanning New Orleans collective — funk / spoken word / R&B.

events.title: Djangofest Northwest
events.venue: Whidbey Island Center for the Arts
events.notes: Gypsy-jazz festival on Whidbey. Ferry-connected — achievable as a day or overnight trip.

events.title: Seattle Festival of Dance + Improvisation

events.notes: Placeholder summer window — confirm exact dates.

events.title: Jazz Port Townsend (Centrum) — 2026
events.age_notes: exact 2026 dates TBA — traditionally late July
events.notes: Centrum's summer jazz festival + workshops at Fort Worden. Dawn Clement is the new AD (succeeding John Clayton). Weekly agent should confirm exact 2026 dates and update this entry.

events.title: Sleepytime Gorilla Museum
events.notes: Avant-prog / experimental metal. Reunion lineup with theatrical live staging. Rare stop in the PNW — confirmed by Christopher 2026-04-24. Weekly agent should chase down the Substation tickets URL during enrichment.

venue_notes.note: 90%+ of shows are FREE for under-18 via 4Culture. Not auto-included on the calendar — only specific VCA shows that pass the taste filter (i.e., genuinely interesting / non-mainstream) should appear. Treat as a WATCH SOURCE.
